items.briefing:
The Australian Cyber Security Centre has warned that credentials for Fortinet firewalls and VPN gateways have been exposed. If your organisation uses Fortinet products for remote access or network security, IT staff should be notified immediately to check for unauthorised access and consider resetting affected credentials. Separately, a compromise involving the Klue app is being used to steal data from Salesforce accounts — if your organisation uses Salesforce, confirm with IT that your integrations and connected apps are reviewed.

**Practical tip:** If you use a VPN to connect to work remotely, log out and back in today, and report any unusual login prompts to your IT team straight away.

featured.title: Mackay Sugar cyber attack flagged as broader risk to Australia’s food supply chain
featured.quote: Major Australian food exporter hit by cyber attack, exposing critical supply chain vulnerability.
